CustomField.formula: OR( ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Medical Bills — Past"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Medical Bills — Future"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Lost Wages — Past"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Lost Wages — Future"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Loss of Earning Capacity"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Property Damage — Vehicle"), ISPICKVAL(Damage_Type__c, "Property Damage — Other") )
CustomField.label: Is Special Damage
